action.description: Read Third Time in Full – ADOPTED - 39-29-2AYES – Alfieri, Barbieri, Beiswenger, Boyle, Bruce, Burgoyne, Cayler, Church, Crane(12), Crane(13), Egbert, Ehardt, Ehlers, Gannon, Harris, Hawkins, Healey, Hill, Holtzclaw, Hostetler, Leavitt, Marmon, Mendive, Mitchell, Monks, Palmer, Price, Rasor, Redman, Rubel, Scott, Shepherd, Shirts, Skaug(Chadwick), Tanner(13), Tanner(14), Thompson, Wisniewski, Mr. SpeakerNAYS – Bingham, Cannon, Cheatum, Cornilles, Dygert, Erickson(Larsen), Fuhriman, Furniss, Galaviz, Garner, Green, Hall(Stone), Handy, Manwaring, Mathias, McCann, Mickelsen, Miller, Nelsen, Petzke, Pickett, Pohanka, Raybould, Raymond, Sauter, Vander Woude, Veile, Weber, WheelerAbsent – Berch, HawsFloor Sponsor - HostetlerTitle apvd - to Senate
